channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Childhood Stunting in South Africa: The Critical Role of Gut Health Beyond Nutrition
item.description: South Africa faces a paradox where supermarkets are stocked yet childhood stunting remains prevalent. Despite global increases in food production and wealth, approximately 150-million children under f...

item.title: PM Nchemba calls for reform on bank loan collateral sales
item.description: Dodoma. Tanzania Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba has openly criticised local banks for selling borrowers’ collateral without taking into account the remaining loan balance, calling the practice unju...

item.title: SAHRC investigates corruption and mismanagement in Gauteng water services
item.description: The South African Human Rights Commission (SAHRC) has begun a three-day public inquiry into Gauteng’s worsening water crisis, citing corruption, poor management, and failing infrastructure as key issu...

item.title: Nigerian and US troops eliminate 175 ISIS militants in Northeast operations
item.description: Naija Defence Headquarters don yan say 175 ISIS militants don die for joint counterterrorism operations wey Nigerian troops and United States Africa Command (AFRICOM) dey run across some parts of Nort...

item.title: Montreal sex workers strike during F1 to demand labour protections and decriminalization
item.description: During the Montreal Grand Prix weekend, strippers and sex workers staged a strike to highlight unsafe working conditions and advocate for the decriminalization of sex work. Led by Adore Goldman and th...

item.title: Key Scenes in Blood vs Duty Showing Jamilah's Strong Loyalty and Love for Jalil
item.description: In the ongoing teleserye Blood vs Duty, one of the most talked-about elements is the character of Jamilah, played by Barbie Imperial, and her deep connection with Jalil, portrayed by Gerald Anderson. ...

item.title: Court Rules St Mary’s Academy Assets Not Part of Late Bishop Rwakatare’s Estate
item.description: The Court of Appeal in Tanzania has ruled that properties belonging to St Mary’s International Academy Limited should not be included in the estate of the late Bishop Getrude Rwakatare. The decision c...

item.title: Pantami Withdraws From APC Governorship Primaries in Gombe State
item.description: Professor Isa Ali Ibrahim Pantami, wey dey contest for governorship seat under All Progressives Congress (APC) for Gombe State, don officially withdraw from the race. Pantami, wey be former Minister o...

item.title: Theo Van Gogh: Portrait from the Year of His Murder and Its Impact on Dutch Society
item.description: Theo van Gogh, a great-grandson of Vincent van Gogh's brother, was tragically murdered on November 2, 2004, in Amsterdam. The Dutch filmmaker and publicist was shot multiple times and had his throat s...

item.title: Canadian tourist charged after allegedly shoulder-checking Disney World worker in Florida
item.description: A 48-year-old man from Palgrave, Ontario, has been charged with battery in Florida after allegedly shoulder-checking a female Disney World employee at Animal Kingdom. The incident occurred on the even...

item.title: Man Charged Following Assault on Former Hudson’s Bay Store Manager in Victoria, B.C.
item.description: A 38-year-old man, Alan Stanley Vandevoorde, has been formally charged in connection with an assault on the general manager of the former Hudson’s Bay store at Mayfair Mall in Victoria, British Columb...

item.title: Takaful insurance grows steadily in Tanzania, Kenya and Uganda despite low awareness
item.description: Takaful, which is Islamic insurance based on Sharia principles, is expanding in East Africa with different levels of growth in Tanzania, Kenya and Uganda. In Tanzania, the sector has shown strong prog...

item.title: CPM May Reconsider Support to TVK if AIADMK Rebels Are Inducted into Cabinet
item.description: The CPM has issued a warning regarding its support to the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) government in Tamil Nadu. CPM state secretary P Shanmugam, speaking at Tiruvarur, indicated that if the TVK inc...

item.title: Southampton removed from Championship play-offs over training session spying
item.description: Dem don remove Southampton from the Championship play-offs after dem admit say dem dey breach plenty English Football League (EFL) rules by watching other teams’ training without permission. Independe...

item.title: Amanda Blake’s Role as Miss Kitty Russell in Gunsmoke: A Look at Her Iconic Performance
item.description: Amanda Blake’s portrayal of Miss Kitty Russell on the long-running TV western series Gunsmoke remains one of the most memorable performances in television history. She played the character for 19 year...

item.title: The Art and Legacy of Mich, Pioneer of Belle Époque Posters
item.description: Michel Liebeaux (1881–1923), known by his artistic pseudonym Mich, was a leading French poster artist and caricaturist who left a significant mark on early 20th-century visual culture. Mich became ren...

item.title: Lella Ford Shares Her Favorite Songs That Make Daily Routines Fun with Singing
item.description: In a recent feature on ABS-CBN, rising star Lella Ford from the hit show Everybody Sing Season 4 opened up about the songs that make her ordinary daily activities more enjoyable. The young artist reve...

item.title: How Companies Fit Build Investor Confidence Through Media and Leadership Visibility
item.description: For any company wey dey try attract investors, na long before the quarterly meetings or investor calls that investor dey make decision. Investor confidence dey start from the kind story wey dey form a...

item.title: Prince Edward Island RCMP identify human remains from three decades ago using familial DNA
item.description: The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) in Prince Edward Island have identified human remains that were discovered almost 30 years ago through the use of familial DNA technology. The remains, initial...

item.title: How Mobile Gamers Now Prefer Guides Before Playing
item.description: Mobile entertainment don change, no be like before wey you fit just open phone, tap app, and kill ten minutes. Nowadays, players dey waka between short videos, sports updates, casual games, betting sl...
